{{Quote|Glad you are here, soldier! Are you a pilot? If so, we need your assistance immediately. The Rebels are bringing in reinforcements from the Lok system. We just finished cleaning them out of the Corellia system and are preparing to move in our capital ships. Your orders, if you accept them, are to destroy 15 of their fighters in the Lok system, to prevent them from ever getting here.|Lieutenant Wulf|<ref name="SWG:SK">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref>}}
'''Wulf''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was in charge of the Imperial air strikes on the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] fleet during the [[Battle of Restuss]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Wulf was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
[[File:Wulf2.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Lieutenant Wulf at the Imperial base near Restuss]]
